name: Pink Fish Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate fish fillets while making the stock.
2. Combine all stock ingredients; bring to a boil. Lower heat and simmer for 30 minutes. Strain and reserve.
3. To make soup, cook butter, onion, carrot, leek, celery, and garlic, covered over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir flour into the vegetables; blend well. Add tomato paste and puréed tomatoes, stirring until well mixed.
5. Add thyme (or a pinch of nutmeg), parsley; cover and cook over low heat for 10-15 minutes.
6. Add strained stock and fish pieces to the vegetables. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Add shrimp and simmer until heated through. Serve sprinkled with paprika.
